video.headline: Frankfurt embarrass Bayern Munich in 5-1 thrashing
video.caption: Bayern Munich suffer their first loss of the Bundesliga season after a 5-1 thrashing vs. Frankfurt.
video.title: Frankfurt embarrass Bayern Munich in 5-1 thrashing
video.description: Bayern Munich suffer their first loss of the Bundesliga season after a 5-1 thrashing vs. Frankfurt.

tracking.trackingName: SOC_Highlight (Frankfurt embarrass Bayern Munich in 5-1 thrashing) Bundesliga 2023/12/09 US ONLY

article.story:
BERLIN -- - Eintracht Frankfurt routed Bayern Munich 5-1 to deal the 11-time defending champion its first Bundesliga defeat of the season on Saturday.

Omar Marmoush starred for the home team to end its run of four straight defeats across all competitions, and Bayern star Harry Kane failed to score for just the third time in the Bundesliga this season.

Bayern arguably paid the price for its unexpected long period between games as last weekend's match with Union Berlin was called off at short notice because of heavy snowfall in the Bavarian capital. Bayern hadn't played since Nov. 29.

Union put the break to good use, however, ending its run of 15 games without a win across all competitions by beating Borussia Mönchengladbach 3-1.

Benedict Hollerbach and Mikkel Kaufmann scored their first Bundesliga goals to lead Union to victory in coach Nenad Bjelica's first home game in charge.

Freiburg enjoyed a 1-0 win at Wolfsburg, Werder Bremen defeated Augsburg 2-0, and Heidenheim came from behind to beat Darmstadt 3-2 in the duel between promoted teams.

Borussia Dortmund hosted Leipzig late.

------

AP soccer: https://apnews.com/hub/soccer

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Frankfurt go 3-0 up vs. Bayern after two quick-fire goals) 2023/12/09 US ONLY

videos.headline: Kimmich scores stunner to pull one back for Bayern vs. Frankfurt
videos.description: Joshua Kimmich scores just before halftime to give Bayern hope of a second-half comeback vs. Frankfurt.

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Kimmich scores stunner to pull one back for Bayern vs. Frankfurt)  2023/12/09 US ONLY

videos.headline: Frankfurt stun Bayern with rapid counter to increase lead
videos.description: Eric Junior Dina Ebimbe scores his second of the game to put Frankfurt 4-1 up vs. Bayern Munich.

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Frankfurt stun Bayern with rapid counter to increase lead) 2023/12/09 US ONLY

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal!  Eintracht Frankfurt 1, FC Bayern München 0. Omar Marmoush (Eintracht Frankfurt) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner.
Kim Min-Jae (FC Bayern München) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Eintracht Frankfurt 2, FC Bayern München 0. Junior Dina Ebimbe (Eintracht Frankfurt) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom left corner    following a fast break.

Goal!  Eintracht Frankfurt 3, FC Bayern München 0. Hugo Larsson (Eintracht Frankfurt) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Omar Marmoush   following a fast break.
Goal!  Eintracht Frankfurt 3, FC Bayern München 1. Joshua Kimmich (FC Bayern München) right footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Leroy Sané.
First Half ends, Eintracht Frankfurt 3, FC Bayern München 1.
Substitution, FC Bayern München. Konrad Laimer replaces Noussair Mazraoui.
Substitution, FC Bayern München. Raphaël Guerreiro replaces Alphonso Davies.

Goal!  Eintracht Frankfurt 4, FC Bayern München 1. Junior Dina Ebimbe (Eintracht Frankfurt) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Farès Chaïbi   following a fast break.

Goal!  Eintracht Frankfurt 5, FC Bayern München 1. Ansgar Knauff (Eintracht Frankfurt) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Omar Marmoush.Goal awarded following VAR Review.
Substitution, FC Bayern München. Serge Gnabry replaces Kingsley Coman.
Substitution, FC Bayern München. Thomas Müller replaces Eric Choupo-Moting.
Omar Marmoush (Eintracht Frankfurt) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Leroy Sané (FC Bayern München) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, FC Bayern München. Jamal Musiala replaces Serge Gnabry because of an injury.
Substitution, Eintracht Frankfurt. Niels Nkounkou replaces Junior Dina Ebimbe.
Substitution, Eintracht Frankfurt. Makoto Hasebe replaces Omar Marmoush.
Substitution, Eintracht Frankfurt. Jens Petter Hauge replaces Ansgar Knauff.
Substitution, Eintracht Frankfurt. Jessic Ngankam replaces Farès Chaïbi.
Substitution, Eintracht Frankfurt. Elias Baum replaces Aurélio Buta.
Second Half ends, Eintracht Frankfurt 5, FC Bayern München 1.
